name: Santa Fe Chicken with Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 1/4-ounce) DEL MONTE FreshCut Golden Sweet Whole Kernel Corn, drained
4 Skinned and boned chicken breast halves
3/4 cup (3 ounces) 4-cheese Mexican blend shredded cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 2 tablespoons olive oil and the next five ingredients: corn, diced tomatoes, onion, cilantro, and red wine vinegar. Stir well and cover. Chill for 1 hour.
2. Pound chicken breast halves to a thickness of 1/4 inch using plastic wrap and a meat mallet or rolling pin.
3. Make a lengthwise slit in one of each green chile and open them to remove seeds. Place a chile over each chicken breast half.
4. Sprinkle cheese, salt, and pepper on the chicken breasts. Roll up each chicken breast half, securing with wooden picks.
5. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Cook the chicken for 4 to 5 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
6. Sprinkle with additional cilantro and serve with corn salsa.
